title: Windows: Organize Your Browsing
drDigitalIntro: Windows are separate the browser experiences. Each window can have its own tabs. You might open one window for shopping and another for work — they're completely separate. Create a new window with File > New Window or Ctrl+N. Windows are useful when you want to keep things completely organized.

playgroundTask.goal: Open a second, separate browser window

steps.say: A window is a whole separate browser. Click New Window to open a second one.

drDigitalSuccess: You opened a second window. Windows are fully separate — one for work, one for shopping — each with its own tabs.
drDigitalHint: Look for the 🪟 New Window button in the action bar and click it.
